data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements positioned for quick access based on user intent.
data.technical_spec: Buttons and links are sized appropriately for touch interfaces.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimized decision time by reducing choices in navigation.
data.technical_spec: Implemented in menus and action selections.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistent experience aligned with other popular sites to reduce learning curve.
data.technical_spec: Standard navigation bars and user interface patterns.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Group related items to streamline user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Use of whitespace to logically separate sections.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing design to enhance user perception of usability.
data.technical_spec: High fidelity graphics and smooth transition animations.
